description: Producer/referee separation for evidence_mode. Three-part decomposition: mode_label_match, contract_satisfied, board_result. Labels classify; only contract_satisfied can raise a claim. producer_hint_contract_failed is the key negative: hint label matches, contract fails. On-chain anchor vectors added: block_time < outcome_ts is required for precedence_verified.

vectors.description: Baseline: producer declares embedded_fixture; referee finds key material in header and recomputes successfully. Label matches, contract satisfied. Board displays full claim.

board_result.evidence_contract: embedded_fixture: key in header, hash recomputable, signature input recomputable

vectors.description: Key negative from rpelevin: producer hint label matches referee mode name, but contract fails. Producer declares embedded_fixture; referee also derives embedded_fixture as the named mode — but public_key_hash is absent, key_hash_recomputed_from_fixture fails. mode_label_match: true, contract_satisfied: false. This is producer_hint_contract_failed, not producer_hint_contradicts_referee. The distinction: _contradicts_referee means the producer named the wrong evidence source; _contract_failed means the producer named a plausible source but did not supply the evidence required to earn it.
vectors.failure_detail: Producer declared embedded_fixture; referee derives embedded_fixture as mode name. But public_key_hash is absent — key_hash_recomputed_from_fixture fails. Labels agree; contract does not hold. Claim falls to admission_multisig_unverifiable regardless of label match.

board_result.blocked_reason: key_material_absent: public_key_hash not present; embedded_fixture contract requires recomputable key in header
board_result.evidence_contract: embedded_fixture failed: key recomputation path broken despite label match

vectors.description: Producer declares pinned_registry; referee finds no key_record_hash, registry_entry_hash, or resolution_time. Label mismatch: producer names pinned_registry, referee derives embedded_fixture (embedded key still present and recomputable). mode_label_match: false, contract_satisfied: true on the embedded path. This is producer_hint_contradicts_referee — producer named the wrong evidence source. Row falls to admission_independent because the claim level ceiling of the referee-derived mode is lower.
vectors.failure_detail: Producer declared pinned_registry but key_record_hash, registry_entry_hash, and resolution_time are all absent. Referee cannot verify a registry path. Embedded key is present and recomputable, so referee derives embedded_fixture (not unverifiable). Labels diverge; contract holds on the referee path but at a lower claim ceiling.

board_result.blocked_reason: pinned_registry contract unmet: no resolution evidence available to referee; falls to embedded_fixture ceiling
board_result.evidence_contract: embedded_fixture (referee-derived): key recomputable but claim capped at admission_independent

vectors.description: On-chain anchor baseline: block_time < outcome_ts. Precedence holds — the commitment predates the outcome. anchor.method: on-chain, Arbitrum. block_time * 1000 < outcome_ts_ms (strict). This is the invariant TKCollective's trail b4377bcd demonstrated in production (margin 599s).

board_result.evidence_contract: on-chain anchor: block_time * 1000 < outcome_ts_ms, margin 599000ms, Arbitrum-one

vectors.description: On-chain anchor present but block_time > outcome_ts. Commitment arrived after the outcome — precedence does not hold. Anchor proves existence, not precedence. Board must not display anchoring_precedence_verified even though the tx_hash is real.
vectors.failure_detail: block_time * 1000 > outcome_ts_ms: the on-chain anchor confirmed after the outcome was recorded. Existence is proven; precedence is not. These are separate invariants and must be asserted separately on the board.

board_result.blocked_reason: block_time * 1000 > outcome_ts_ms by 220000ms: anchor confirms existence, not precedence
board_result.evidence_contract: on-chain anchor: existence proven (tx_hash recomputable), precedence not established

vectors.description: On-chain anchor declared but block_time absent from the fixture. Referee cannot establish either existence or precedence without a confirmed block_time. Anchor falls to unverifiable.
vectors.failure_detail: anchor.tx_hash is present but anchor.block_time is null. Referee cannot confirm when the anchor was included in the chain. Without block_time, neither existence nor precedence can be independently asserted from the fixture.

board_result.blocked_reason: block_time absent: on-chain anchor cannot be confirmed from fixture alone
board_result.evidence_contract: on-chain anchor failed: block_time required for both existence and precedence assertions
